mcp.description: Configuration for the MCP. You can chose if it should be enabled or not and the transport to use 'remote' (default) and 'local'.

subagent.description: Configuration for the subagent. You can choose if it should be enabled or not.

instructions.description: Configuration for the automatic AGENTS.md injection. You can choose if it should be enabled or not.

enabled.description: It can be either a boolean or an array containing the skills that you want to enable

skills.description: Configuration for the skills. You can choose if it they should be enabled or not, or specify an array of skill names to enable only specific skills.
